tweet.text: RT @SaycheeseDGTL: Rod Wave says you have to be in tune with reality to really understand his music 👀 https://t.co/xmYkohNODG
RT @PicturesFoIder: They tried giving him 6 months in jail for this https://t.co/G1Qj548bPA
RT @isaiahthomas: “They connect with my words, right at the part where it hurts” 🏁 #SLOWGRIND https://t.co/1OXmJo8wKn
